classification_matches_clean_count.note: report status is determined by whether any branch can hide a clean one-Higgs pre-cup survivor

finite_envelope_scope_is_complete.note: all Serre-dual H1/H2 character compositions are enumerated when no branch cap is set

source_artifacts_verified.note: envelope audit starts from verified CICY6715/6927 and operator-graph atlas artifacts

unresolved_candidate_set_matches_atlas.note: the five CICY6715 component-unresolved q1 candidates are exactly the atlas uncertainty set

unresolved_structure_is_single_wedge_pai.note: each unresolved candidate has exactly one unresolved wedge pair, its dual, and compatible singlets

interpretation.note: This is an envelope audit, not an actual higher-map representative resolution. A zero clean count proves that no admissible character completion of the unresolved CICY6715 wedge pair can hide a clean one-Higgs/proton-safe pre-cup survivor under the current operator gates.

parameters.branch_convention: enumerate all nonnegative Z2xZ2 character multiplicities for the unresolved wedge2_V H1 and H2 dimensions; assign wedge2_V_dual by Serre duality, using self-duality of Z2xZ2 irreps
